podcasts.name: The Ecom Academy
podcasts.title: Branded Klaviyo Email designs in seconds using Claude Design #shorts
podcasts.transcript: Okay, the email looks great, but it's not in our brand colors. Can you please scan our site again to get the correct [music] brand colors? I'm also going to upload a logo that we can use and it's made that change now. Great. So, we can see the new Dose logo. Colors have changed slightly. [music] Coffee is red here. We've got the black and red. This looks really good. This is definitely much more on brand for us. Okay, this is great. So, let's just say I wanted to make a few little tweaks to this. We could pull in our header bar here, right? We can go and edit that header bar with its logo as stacked or whether its logo is centered. We can do whatever we want there. We can edit the text directly in here >> [music] >> and we can do anything that we want. Basically, this is now a fully editable template directly inside of Klaviyo.
